projects: Fraud Shield | Python, Streamlit – Developed an end-to-end fraud detection system by cleaning, preprocessing, and transforming transactional data for machine learning workflows. – Addressed class imbalance using appropriate strategies, focusing on improving fraud detection recall to minimize missed fraudulent cases. – Trained and optimized multiple machine learning models through tuning and threshold adjustment to improve prediction performance. – Built a Streamlit-based application for real-time transaction analysis, enabling users to assess fraud risk effectively. – Evaluated performance using PR-AUC, ROC-AUC, and confusion matrix analysis to ensure reliability in real-world scenarios.
